compiled_state.title: RED: Behavioral tests for test-ci-enforcement-e2e.sh opt-in gate and env prereqs
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Story DD Coverage
This task is responsible for satisfying:
- DD3: Unit tests are written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Implementation Notes
Create tests/scripts/test-ci-enforcement-e2e-behavioral.sh.
This file tests the E2E script's guard behavior without hitting the live GitHub API.

Three behavioral tests:
1. test_opt_in_gate_exits_zero_skip
   Given: RUN_CI_E2E is absent
   When: bash tests/scripts/test-ci-enforcement-e2e.sh 2>/dev/null
   Then: exits 0 AND output contains "SKIP"

2. test_missing_repo_exits_nonzero
   Given: RUN_CI_E2E=1, CI_E2E_REPO is absent
   When: RUN_CI_E2E=1 bash tests/scripts/test-ci-enforcement-e2e.sh 2>/dev/null || rc=$?
   Then: exits non-zero (2 or 1)

3. test_missing_gh_exits_nonzero
   Given: RUN_CI_E2E=1, CI_E2E_REPO set, but gh not on PATH
   When: RUN_CI_E2E=1 CI_E2E_REPO=owner/repo env PATH=/usr/bin:/bin bash tests/scripts/test-ci-enforcement-e2e.sh 2>/dev/null || rc=$?
   Then: exits non-zero (2 or 1)

Pattern reference: see tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app-real-url.sh lines 46-65 for the established opt-in gate pattern.

## .test-index Updates Required
- Add RED marker: tests/scripts/test-ci-enforcement-e2e.sh [test_opt_in_gate_exits_zero_skip]
- Add mapping: tests/scripts/test-ci-enforcement-e2e.sh:tests/scripts/test-ci-enforcement-e2e-behavioral.sh
  (fuzzy match does NOT catch this pair — explicit entry required)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-ci-enforcement-e2e-behavioral.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-ci-enforcement-e2e-behavioral.sh
- [ ] bash tests/scripts/test-ci-enforcement-e2e-behavioral.sh exits 0 with all tests PASS
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ci-enforcement-e2e-behavioral.sh
- [ ] .test-index contains RED marker for test-ci-enforcement-e2e.sh
  Verify: grep '\[test_opt_in_gate_exits_zero_skip\]' .test-index
- [ ] .test-index contains mapping entry for test-ci-enforcement-e2e.sh
  Verify: grep 'test-ci-enforcement-e2e.sh' .test-index

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
